positive: A sophisticated, minimalist line-art graphic depicting a wise owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by stylized geometric stars and cosmic nebulae elements. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern abstract geometry, rendered in deep midnight blue, creamy ivory, and subtle metallic gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, forming a clean, strong silhouette suitable for apparel printing. High contrast, ethereal, serene, vector quality, clean black lines on a white background, perfect symmetry, designed for repeat pattern adaptation.
